retrospective_reviews.summary: Retrospective review after merge identified governance gaps: PR #2 merged without GitHub approving review; repo-local lifecycle record missing; verification claim initially inaccurate; commit not produced by capability-commit-author. No critical runtime defects found. Follow-up PR required to add repo-local lifecycle record and correct records.

Actual commit bcb4a6f bundled docs, feat, fix, build, and test changes into one feat(implementation) commit. Missing required trailers: Task-Ref, Lifecycle-Record-ID, SDL-Commit-Author. Future commits must be routed through capability-commit-author.

Independent sibling-agent review of PR #3. Verified repo-local lifecycle record matches out-of-band canonical record, summary document accurately reflects SDL retrospective enforcement, and no additional runtime defects were introduced. Approved for merge.
